channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DRREDDY] Dr Reddy's Board to consider final dividend for FY25-26
item.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting to consider and potentially recommend a final dividend for the Financial Year 2025-26. This intimation follows a prior announcement made on March 23, 2026. The company is informing stakeholders about this upcoming agenda item for their information and records.

  • Board meeting scheduled to consider final dividend for FY2025-26.
  • Potential dividend recommendation could impact shareholder returns.
  • This intimation is a follow-up to a previous announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DR.REDDY'S LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUNRETAIL] Sun Retail Appoints Khyati Shah as Independent Director
item.description:
Sun Retail Ltd. announced the appointment of Mrs. Khyati Bhavya Shah as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director, effective April 16, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. This appointment follows the resignation of Ms. Nisha Sukhdevbhai Parmar as a Non-Executive Independent Director, effective April 15, 2026, due to pre-occupation. Consequent to these changes, the Board of Directors reconstituted the Audit Committee, Nomination and Remuneration Committee, and Stakeholders Relationship Committee. Mrs. Shah, a Company Secretary by profession with over 7 years of experience in corporate and allied laws, will chair the Audit and Nomination & Remuneration Committees.

  • Mrs. Khyati Bhavya Shah appointed Additional Non-Executive Independent Director.
  • Appointment effective April 16, 2026, pending shareholder approval.
  • Ms. Nisha Sukhdevbhai Parmar resigned as Independent Director.
  • Board committees, including Audit and Nomination, were reconstituted.
  • Mrs. Shah brings over 7 years of experience in corporate law.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sun Retail Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [VPL] Vrundavan Plantation Board to meet April 24 for Director Appointment
item.description:
Vrundavan Plantation Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on April 24, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the appointment of Ms. Malvika Jagani (DIN: 11409166) as an Additional Director. She is proposed to be appointed in the Non-Executive Independent Category, with the appointment being subject to necessary statutory and shareholder approvals. The meeting will also address any other matters with the Chair's permission, adhering to relevant corporate governance regulations.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 24, 2026.
  • To consider appointing Ms. Malvika Jagani as Additional Director.
  • Ms. Jagani will serve as a Non-Executive Independent Director.
  • Appointment is subject to statutory and shareholder approvals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vrundavan Plantation Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AAATECH] AAA Technologies: Open Offer for 26% stake at ₹101/share
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mark Corporate Advisors Pvt Ltd, Manager to the Offer, has submitted the Letter of Offer for an open offer to the public shareholders of AAA Technologies Ltd. The offer is made by Jyotirgamya Advisory Private Limited and Mr. Ashok Kumar Chordia (Acquirers) to acquire up to 3,334,968 fully paid-up equity shares, representing 26.00% of the voting share capital of AAA Technologies. The offer price is ₹101.00 per equity share, payable in cash. This offer is made in accordance with SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. It is not a conditional offer and is not subject to any minimum level of acceptance. The offer price may be subject to upward revision as per SEBI regulations.

  • Acquirers launched an open offer for 26% of AAA Technologies' shares.
  • Offer price is ₹101.00 per equity share, payable in cash.
  • The offer targets 3,334,968 equity shares from public shareholders.
  • Offer is unconditional and not subject to minimum acceptance.
  • Offer price may be subject to upward revision as per SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AAA Technologies Ltd | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [3MINDIA] 3M India Appoints Jerry Daniel as Country Business Leader – Healthcare
item.description:
3M India Ltd has announced the appointment of Mr. Jerry Daniel as the Country Business Leader – Healthcare, effective May 1, 2026. Mr. Daniel will be designated as a Senior Management Personnel. He has been associated with the 3M Group since 2013, holding various leadership roles across Asia, including Area Portfolio Leader for Automotive & Aerospace and Regional Sales Leader for Southeast Asia. Currently, he serves as Business Operations Leader – Transportation & Energy. Concurrently, Mr. Rajiv Gupta, who currently holds the Country Business Leader - Healthcare position, will transition to a senior leadership role within the 3M Group, ceasing to be a Senior Management Personnel for 3M India Ltd from April 30, 2026.

  • Jerry Daniel appointed Country Business Leader – Healthcare, effective May 1, 2026.
  • Daniel will be considered a Senior Management Personnel for 3M India.
  • Rajiv Gupta transitions to a new senior role within the 3M Group.
  • Gupta ceases as Senior Management Personnel for 3M India from April 30, 2026.
  • Daniel brings extensive leadership experience from 3M Group since 2013.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 3M INDIA LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PVVINFRA] PVV Infra Board to Meet on April 21, 2026 for Rights Issue Call Money
item.description:
PVV Infra Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 21, 2026. The agenda includes considering and approving the First and Final Call of ₹3.75 per share on 9,86,64,284 partly paid-up equity shares from the Company's Rights Issue, which will convert them into fully paid-up shares upon receipt of the call money. Additionally, the board will consider the appointment of Mr. Shubh Gangully as Whole-Time Director, and Mr. Shrikant Pathak and Mr. Gadde Rama Krishna as Independent Directors. The board will also discuss and approve the submission of bids for two Wayside Amenity Facilities under NHLML, a Ministry of Road Transport and Highways initiative.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 21, 2026.
  • To approve First and Final Call of ₹3.75/share on Rights Issue shares.
  • Appointment of Mr. Shubh Gangully as Whole-Time Director.
  • Appointment of two new Independent Directors.
  • Consideration of bids for two NHLML wayside amenity projects.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PVV Infra Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WSFX] WSFx Global Pay Appoints Ravi Dubey as Sr. VP & Head – D2C
item.description:
WSFx Global Pay Ltd has announced the appointment of Mr. Ravi Dubey as Sr. Vice President & Head – D2C, effective April 16, 2026. Mr. Dubey is a seasoned digital and D2C growth leader with over 20 years of experience in building and scaling digital-first and e-commerce businesses. His expertise spans performance marketing, CRM, customer retention, and omnichannel strategy, with a strong track record of driving end-to-end growth. Previously, he founded and headed SellPro Commerce (Ministry of Nuts) and co-founded Digital Refresh Networks. He also held key leadership roles at Hungama Digital Media and Network18 Media. This strategic appointment is expected to bolster WSFx Global Pay's direct-to-consumer initiatives and digital transformation efforts.

  • WSFx Global Pay appoints Ravi Dubey as Sr. VP & Head – D2C.
  • Appointment is effective from April 16, 2026.
  • Dubey brings over 20 years of digital and D2C growth experience.
  • His expertise includes performance marketing and omnichannel strategy.
  • Aims to strengthen the company's direct-to-consumer business.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WSFx Global Pay Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PENIND] Bandhan MF crosses 5% stake in Pennar Industries
item.description:
Bandhan Mutual Fund, through its scheme Bandhan Small Cap Fund, acquired 1,20,000 equity shares of Pennar Industries Limited on April 13, 2026. This open market acquisition, representing 0.0889% of the paid-up capital, increased Bandhan MF's total holding in Pennar Industries to 5.0469%. This crosses the 5% threshold, triggering a disclosure under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Bandhan Mutual Fund increased its stake in Pennar Industries.
  • The fund acquired an additional 0.0889% of equity shares.
  • Total holding now stands at 5.0469% of the company's paid-up capital.
  • The acquisition was made through open market purchases.
  • This triggers a disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PENNAR INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [OVOBELE] Ovobel Foods clarifies no undisclosed info impacting share price
item.description:
Ovobel Foods Ltd has issued a clarification in response to emails from the BSE dated April 9 and April 15, 2026, which requested information regarding any announcements that might affect the company's share price behavior. The company stated that it has consistently made all necessary disclosures as required under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. Ovobel Foods confirmed that there is no undisclosed information or impending announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, that could have a bearing on its share price. The company reiterated that any price movement in its shares is entirely market-based and that no further information is available on this matter.

  • Ovobel Foods responded to BSE queries on share price movement.
  • Company confirmed no undisclosed material information exists.
  • All SEBI disclosure regulations have been fully complied with.
  • Share price movement is attributed solely to market forces.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OVOBEL FOODS LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [INFY*] Infosys Q4 & FY26 Results on April 23, 2026; Earnings Call Scheduled
item.description:
Infosys Ltd. announced that it will declare its financial results for the fourth quarter and the full year ended March 31, 2026, on Thursday, April 23, 2026, around 3:45 p.m. Indian Standard Time. Following the results announcement, the company's leadership team will host a press conference at 4:30 p.m. IST, which will be streamed live. Additionally, an earnings conference call, open to investors and analysts globally, is scheduled for 5:30 p.m. IST on the same day. Participants can join via dial-in numbers or pre-register using a DiamondPass™ link, with the event also webcast live on the company's Investor Relations section.

  • Infosys to announce Q4 and annual results on April 23, 2026.
  • Results will be released around 3:45 p.m. IST.
  • A press conference is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. IST.
  • An earnings conference call will follow at 5:30 p.m. IST.
  • Investors can participate in the earnings call via dial-in or webcast.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INFOSYS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
